zh.Ivybridge, Devon, England: 英國英格蘭戴文易維布利其

zh.lifeSummary: 當Joane Rowse於1326年出生在英國英格蘭哈普爾時，她的父親Ralph le Rouse42歲，母親Joan Godisford41歲。她與Symon de Peplesham Lord of Bucksteep and Sussex在英國素可瓦特林結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。她去世於1407年1月21日在英國英格蘭素可享年81歲，埋葬在英國素可瓦特林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joane Rowse于1326年出生在英国英格兰哈普爾时，她的父亲Ralph le Rouse42岁，母亲Joan Godisford41岁。她与Symon de Peplesham Lord of Bucksteep and Sussex在英国素可瓦特林结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。她去世于1407年1月21日在英国英格兰素可享年81岁，埋葬在英国素可瓦特林。

nameMeanings.name: Rowse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cornish: habitational name from Rowse in Pillaton (Cornwall). The placename derives from Middle Cornish ros ‘promontory, hill spur, moor’.

variants.name: Rouse
meanings: English: nickname for a person with red hair or a ruddy complexion, from Middle English, Anglo-Norman French rous(e) ‘red(-haired)’ (from Latin russ(e)us).
Walloon and northern French (Rousé): variant of Rosé (see Rose ).

nameMeanings.name: Joane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

variants.name: Johanne
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joann
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Joane Rowse was born in 1326, in Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Ralph le Rouse, was 42 and her mother, Joan Godisford, was 41. She married Symon de Peplesham Lord of Bucksteep and Sussex in Wartling, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. She died on 21 January 1407, in Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 81, and was buried in Wartling, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joane Rowse est née en 1326, à Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph le Rouse, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Joan Godisford, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Symon de Peplesham Lord of Bucksteep and Sussex à Wartling, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 21 janvier 1407, à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterrée à Wartling, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joane Rowse 1326 in Hampshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ralph le Rouse 42 und ihre Mutter Joan Godisford 41. Sie hat in Wartling, Sussex, England Symon de Peplesham Lord of Bucksteep and Sussex geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. Januar 1407 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Sussex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Wartling, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joane Rowse è nata il nel 1326 nel Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Ralph le Rouse, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Joan Godisford, aveva 41 anni. Lei sposato Symon de Peplesham Lord of Bucksteep and Sussex nel Wartling, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì il 21 gennaio 1407, nel Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolta a Wartling, Sussex, England.

ja.Sussex, England: イギリスイギリススセックス
ja.lifeSummary: Joane Rowseが1326年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアで生まれた時，父Ralph le Rouseは42歳，母Joan Godisfordは41歳であった。イギリススセックスワートリングでSymon de Peplesham Lord of Bucksteep and Sussexと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1407年1月21日にイギリスイギリススセックスで81歳で死去し，イギリススセックスワートリングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joane Rowse(이)가 1326년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph le Rouse(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Godisford(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 영국 수세스 워틀링에서 Symon de Peplesham Lord of Bucksteep and Sussex(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1407년 1월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 워틀링에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joane Rowse nasceu em 1326, em Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralph le Rouse, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Joan Godisford, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com Symon de Peplesham Lord of Bucksteep and Sussex em Wartling, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 21 de janeiro de 1407, em Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 81 anos, e foi sepultada em Wartling, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joane Rowse родилась в 1326 г. в местности хампшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Ralph le Rouse было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Godisford, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Symon de Peplesham Lord of Bucksteep and Sussex в местности вартлинг, суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Она умерла 21 января 1407 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 81 год и была похоронена в местности вартлинг, суссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joane Rowse nació en 1326, en Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Ralph le Rouse, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Joan Godisford, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Symon de Peplesham Lord of Bucksteep and Sussex en Wartling, Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió el 21 de enero de 1407, en Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultada en Wartling, Sussex, Inglaterra.
